name: Trend Vision One API
description: Trend Micro Vision One (formerly XDR) REST API v3.0. Provides programmatic access to detection, response, threat intelligence, and security operations capabilities including alerts, suspicious objects, endpoint actions, email actions, network security, and workbench management.
